scripts.db:delete-users: node -e "const {DatabaseSync}=require('node:sqlite');const db=new DatabaseSync('data/app.db');db.exec('PRAGMA foreign_keys=ON');db.exec('DELETE FROM users');console.log('All users deleted (rolls and tokens cascade-deleted too).');"
scripts.db:make-admin: node -e "const {DatabaseSync}=require('node:sqlite');const db=new DatabaseSync('data/app.db');const r=db.prepare(\"UPDATE users SET is_admin=1 WHERE username='idm'\").run();console.log(r.changes?'idm is now admin':'user not found');"
